name: CLI Manual
description: Terminal-inspired manual-page aesthetics for commands, flags, and examples.

preview.sampleText: Command-focused layout for usage guides and operational runbooks.

classes.h2: text-xl font-semibold mt-8 mb-3 text-lime-300 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.h5: text-sm font-semibold mt-4 mb-2 text-lime-200 uppercase tracking-wide
classes.h6: text-xs font-semibold mt-3 mb-2 text-lime-300 uppercase tracking-[0.14em]
classes.th: border border-lime-800/60 p-2 bg-zinc-900 text-left font-semibold text-lime-300
classes.blockquote: my-4 border-l-4 border-yellow-400 bg-zinc-900 py-2 pl-4 italic text-yellow-200
classes.code: rounded bg-zinc-900 px-1.5 py-0.5 font-mono text-sm text-lime-200
classes.pre: my-4 rounded border border-lime-800/70 bg-black p-4 text-zinc-100 overflow-x-auto
